title: Philosophy → Personal Decisions
desc: How implicit positions on free will, ethics, knowledge, and identity silently shape career, relationship, risk, and meaning decisions.

title: Philosophy → Human Organizations
desc: How foundational assumptions about knowledge, ethics, and human nature shape the structure and failure modes of families, companies, and governments.

title: Philosophy of Mind
desc: Major positions on consciousness, personal identity, mental causation, and the mind–body problem — and the dependency structure between them.

title: Philosophy of Ethics
desc: The major ethical frameworks — internal logic, where they actually disagree vs. converge, and what each recommends in concrete situations.

title: Philosophy of Epistemology
desc: How we know what we know and how we should update beliefs. Major positions and what each implies for thinking, arguing, and changing your mind.

title: Evolution–Modernity Mismatch
desc: The gap between the environment human psychology evolved for and the one it now operates in — which mismatches cause the most suffering and what actually addresses them.

title: Navigating an AI World
desc: Structural analysis of how the AI transition restructures work, relationships, and meaning — beyond surface-level career advice.

title: Emotions: Origin, Function, Architecture
desc: What emotions are, where they come from, and what they're for. Major theories and what each implies about regulation and self-understanding.

title: Meaning, Spirituality, Existential Orientation
desc: How humans construct meaning and orient toward existence — across religious, philosophical, and secular frameworks.

title: Bedrock Generating Functions Across Domains
desc: Five frameworks (evolution, thermodynamics, information theory, game theory, complex systems) and the structural isomorphisms they generate.

title: AI Decompression Framework
desc: AI relaxes bandwidth constraints that historically forced lossy compressions — money, governance, credentialing — into stable categories. What happens when those decompress.

title: Information Fidelity / Semantic Compression
desc: How much meaning survives transmission across channels and timescales. The loss function for communication and what it implies for institutions.

title: Trust Architecture
desc: How trust is built, maintained, and destroyed at every scale — and how the trust landscape has shifted from past eras.

title: Parent-to-Child Transmission
desc: How parents shape their children — genes, environment, parenting style, worldview transmission, and the recursion across generations.

title: Prediction and Calibration
desc: What determines how well-calibrated someone is on a domain, and what interventions actually improve calibration.

title: AI Cognitive Profile
desc: Map the orthogonal cognitive dimensions where AI and human capability diverge, using O*NET tasks as the empirical substrate.
